'''Jennifer Roberson''' is a ''[[Star Wars]]'' author who wrote about the deadly, mysterious, and long-lived [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] with her two short stories based on the character of [[Dannik Jerriko]]. "[[Soup's On: The Pipe Smoker's Tale]]" appeared in the ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'' anthology, and "[[Out of the Closet: The Assassin's Tale]]" in the ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' anthology. [[Bantam Spectra]] published the respective collections in [[1995]] and [[1996]].

Outside of ''Star Wars'', Roberson is known for her ''Sword-Dancer'' saga, the ''Chronicles of the Cheysuli'', the ''Karavans'' universe, and the urban fantasy series ''Blood & Bone''.<ref name="Astra">{{WebCite|url=https://astrapublishinghouse.com/creator/jennifer-roberson-2282180/|text=Jennifer Roberson|work=Astra Publishing House|archivedate=20251009135949}}</ref>
